title: SDK deployment session handoff (2026-04-28)
desc: Handoff: SDK public deployment session 2026-04-28. CI/CD pipeline, 188-test smoke suite, release automation, ECDSA license system, Launcher public-source fixes. v6.5.0-sdk released.
steps: REPO: kiexpert/wkappbot-sdk (public). Dev binary: D:\GitHub\WKAppBot\bin\wkappbot-core.exe. SDK CWD: d:\GitHub\wkappbot-sdk|CI DONE: build-launcher.yml (build+25-test smoke), extended-smoke.yml (daily 02:00UTC 188-tests 7min), release.yml (tag->release --generate-notes)|SMOKE DONE: smoke-help.ps1 57 sections 3+ tests/cmd. CI=BasicOnly(25). Local=Extended(188). App-launch sections skip on CI via skipApp=isCI|BUILD DONE: build.cmd --download-only fetches Core from GitHub Release (gh CLI + PS fallback). Core=private binary, Launcher=public source AOT|RELEASE DONE: find-stable-release.ps1 -- artifacts->BasicOnly smoke->tag->gh release. v6.5.0-sdk live. release.yml for tag-triggered releases|LICENSE DONE: ECDSA P-256 offline JWT. gen-license.csx tool. Private key: D:\GitHub\WKAppBot\.env WKAPPBOT_SDK_LICENSE_SIGNING_KEY_ECDSA_P256. Free=no file needed|LAUNCHER FIX: WKAPPBOT_DEBUG=1 gates relay debug. suggest+skill isCoreDirectCmd bypasses Eye pipe. Audit: no private paths, no API keys|DOCS: README clone=install+badges+links. docs/wkappbot-commands.md gen-command-ref.sh. Private skills in dev HQ: sdk-launcher-maintenance, sdk-release-playbook|PENDING: extended-smoke.yml daily trend monitoring. Core closed-source: swap build.yml core-build to gh release download (WKAPPBOT_CORE_REPO+PAT secrets). Launcher public release final audit|PENDING SUGGESTS in dev HQ: sdk-skill-verify-stale-ref, sdk-extended-ci-build-no-artifact-reuse, sdk-launcher-self-update-core|SUGGEST/SKILL RULE: always run D:\GitHub\WKAppBot\bin\wkappbot-core.exe from d:\GitHub\wkappbot-sdk CWD. Never cd to WKAppBot. See memory: feedback_suggest_from_sdk_folder.md
author: claude
